summary.en-US: Batch blocking, report-only workflows, suspicious account review, and local source analysis for Threads.

version.approval_notes: The submitted extension is generated from the repository source with ./build.sh --no-bump. A source archive is uploaded with the AMO submission. The add-on only runs on threads.net and threads.com, and does not request cookies, history, tabs, or broad cross-site browsing permissions.
